name: gem-activator
description: Enable/disable the Green Engineering Menu from SD card — creates /HBpersistence/DBGModeActive. No VCDS needed!
author: dspl1236
scripts: gem_enable.sh - Create DBGModeActive + install ESD screens
mechanism: touch /HBpersistence/DBGModeActive — checked by MMI3GApplication (Audi) and PCM3Root (Porsche) at boot. Same file, same path, both platforms.
notes: v3.0: Discovered DBGModeActive file marker in firmware RE. No longer requires VCDS/ODIS for activation. Confirmed working on Cayenne 958 PCM 3.1. Testing on Audi C7 A6 MMI3G+ K0942.
